ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  India Power Corporation Limited (IPCL) is undergoing Corporate Insolvency Resolution Process (CIRP), with management control transferred to an Interim Resolution Professional. Consequently, Infomerics Ratings has downgraded all of IPCL's bank loan facilities to 'IVR D', explicitly citing a delay in meeting debt service obligations, which confirms a default event. This signifies severe financial distress and poses a significant red flag for all creditors and stakeholders.
